_notes.authorized_scope: hostnames/ips accept exact values or wildcard patterns (e.g. WKS-*, 10.0.0.*). Use ['*'] only when the engagement authorizes the entire estate. Narrow this for real engagements.
_notes.collection_mode: 'full' includes credential and user-content artifacts (Wi-Fi keys, browser history). Confirm written client authorization explicitly covers this. Use 'minimized' to collect metadata + hashes only.
_notes.operators: authorized_operators are matched against the running user (USERNAME / UPN). Only listed operators may run collection against this engagement.
